sources.title: O Kul Hayal Bile Etme, Turkish Movie
sources.description: O Kul Hayal Bile Etme, Turkish Movie

metadata.Plot: Selim is a cruel father who is bigotry and does not know what he does. Even her daughter couldn't accept because she was born as a girl. Ayse was kept under house arrest by her cruel father until she was a school age. She starts school but the violence she receives from her father doesn't even make her breathe. Ayse's life is now a torture. Ayse continues her education at a high school near school. In the end the university exams arise. In this process, Ayse's father, Selim, thinks that she is sufficiently read. According to Selim, the age of marriage has already passed. So he thinks that she must marry a young man as soon as possible.
metadata.Actors: Ümit Çirak, Ceren Karaoglan, Tanya Jaziri
